title: REQ-FEED-031 amendment is incomplete — EARS narrative was fixed but the Acceptance Criteria enumeration still carries the old `newBlock: { id, block_type, content }` payload shape
description:
FIND-S5-PHASE3-004 (iter-1) flagged that REQ-FEED-031 step 5 dispatched `dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, newBlock: { id: <UUID>, block_type: 'paragraph', content: '' }, issuedAt: <ISO> })` while the BlockEditorAdapter type and REQ-FEED-030 command-mapping required `{ noteId, type, content, issuedAt }`. The iter-2 fix amended the EARS sentence (behavioral-spec.md line 1119) and added a clarification block (lines 1121-1122) explicitly noting that the payload follows `{ noteId, type, content, issuedAt }` and that the client UUID rides only on `dispatchFocusBlock.blockId`. THIS IS GOOD.

HOWEVER, the same REQ-FEED-031 contains an Acceptance Criteria enumeration starting at line 1172 that STILL reads:

  '1. dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, newBlock: { id: <UUID>, block_type: \'paragraph\', content: \'\' }, issuedAt: <ISO> }) が 1 回 attempted ...'

This is the EXACT old shape that FIND-S5-PHASE3-004 was supposed to eliminate. The same requirement now contradicts itself — the EARS clause says one shape, the AC enumeration says another. Any future reader (developer, reviewer, or AI agent) cannot tell which is authoritative. PROP-FEED-S5-011 traces to this AC (per the spec test traceability at verification-architecture.md line 715), and PROP-FEED-S5-011 in verification-architecture.md line 715 itself uses the NEW shape, so the AC enumeration in behavioral-spec.md:1173 is also inconsistent with verification-architecture.md.

This is a documentation defect (not a runtime bug — the implementation correctly follows the EARS / adapter type), but it leaves the spec internally inconsistent and undermines the review-loop premise that the spec is authoritative.

evidence.snippet:
Line 1119 (EARS, FIXED): '... dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, type: 'paragraph', content: '', issuedAt }) ...'

Line 1121-1122 (clarification block, ADDED): 'dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning の payload は BlockEditorAdapter 型に厳密準拠し { noteId, type, content, issuedAt } のみ含む。'

Line 1173 (Acceptance Criteria step 1, NOT FIXED): '1. dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, newBlock: { id: <UUID>, block_type: \'paragraph\', content: \'\' }, issuedAt: <ISO> }) が 1 回 attempted (mock の reject も成否を問わずカウント)'
additionalEvidence: .vcsdd/features/ui-feed-list-actions/specs/verification-architecture.md:715 (PROP-FEED-S5-011 description uses the NEW shape: 'dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, type: \'paragraph\', content: \'\', issuedAt })' — so behavioral-spec.md:1173 disagrees with the verification arch as well)
promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/dom/feed-row-empty-fallback.dom.vitest.ts:204-211 (test asserts insertCall.type === 'paragraph' against the NEW shape)

expectedBehavior: Edit behavioral-spec.md line 1173 to read: '1. dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, type: \'paragraph\', content: \'\', issuedAt: <ISO> }) が 1 回 attempted ...' so that the AC enumeration matches the EARS at line 1119 and the verification-architecture PROP-FEED-S5-011 at line 715. Optionally also drop or update the now-stale `<UUID>` reference in step 1 since the UUID only travels via dispatchFocusBlock (step 2).
actualBehavior: EARS narrative says new shape; AC enumeration step 1 still says old shape. Spec self-contradicts within REQ-FEED-031.
